articles.title: Market Power and Capital Constraints
articles.abstract: We explore how traders' equity capitalization influences asset prices in a framework that accounts for market power. In our model, traders with capital constraints engage in transactions in an imperfectly competitive market. We demonstrate that looser capital constraints elevate both asset prices and price impact, the latter diminishing market liquidity. Using Canadian Treasury auction data, we illustrate how to apply our model to quantify these effects. We estimate the shadow costs of capital constraints by leveraging a temporary policy exemption during 2020–2021. We show that while these constraints are only infrequently binding, their relative impact when activated can be sizable.
articles.abstract_cn: 我们探讨了交易者的股本资本化如何在考虑市场力量的框架下影响资产价格。在我们的模型中，有资本限制的交易者在不完全竞争的市场中进行交易。我们证明，宽松的资本限制会提高资产价格和价格影响，后者降低了市场流动性。利用加拿大国债拍卖数据，我们展示了如何应用我们的模型来量化这些效应。我们通过利用2020-2021年期间的临时政策豁免来估计资本限制的影子成本。我们表明，尽管这些限制很少被触发，但当它们被激活时，它们的相对影响可能是巨大的。

articles.title: Robust Misspecified Models
articles.abstract: This paper studies which misspecified models are likely to persist when decision-makers compare them with competing models. The main result characterizes such models based on two features that can be derived from primitives: The model's asymptotic accuracy in predicting the equilibrium distribution of observed outcomes and the "tightness" of the prior around such equilibria. Misspecified models can be robust, persisting against any arbitrary competing model—including the true model—despite decision-makers observing an infinite amount of data. Moreover, simple misspecified models equipped with entrenched priors can be more robust than complex correctly specified models.
articles.abstract_cn: 本文研究了决策者在将它们与竞争模型进行比较时，哪些错误设定的模型可能会持续存在。主要结果基于两个特征来描述这些模型，这两个特征可以从原始数据中推导出来：模型在预测观察结果的均衡分布方面的渐近准确性，以及围绕这些均衡的先验的“紧密度”。错误设定的模型可以是稳健的，即使决策者观察到无限量的数据，它们也能抵御任何任意竞争模型——包括真实模型——的挑战。此外，配备根深蒂固先验的简单错误设定模型可能比复杂的正确设定模型更稳健。

articles.title: Similarity of Information and Collective Action
articles.authors: Deepal Basak, Joyee Deb, Aditya Kuvalekar
articles.abstract: We study a canonical collective action game with incomplete information. Individuals attempt to coordinate to achieve a shared goal, while also facing a temptation to free-ride. More similar information can help them coordinate, but it can also exacerbate free-riding. Our main result shows that more similar information facilitates (impedes) achieving the common goal when it is sufficiently challenging (easy). We apply this insight to show why less powerful authoritarian governments may face larger protests if they restrict press freedom, when committee diversity is beneficial in costly voting, and when a more diverse community contributes more to public good provision.
articles.title_cn: 信息的相似性与集体行动
articles.abstract_cn: 我们研究了一个具有不完全信息的经典集体行动博弈。个体试图协调以实现共同目标，同时也面临着搭便车的诱惑。更相似的信息可以帮助他们协调，但也可能加剧搭便车行为。我们的主要结果表明，当共同目标足够具有挑战性（容易）时，更相似的信息有助于（阻碍）实现共同目标。我们将这一见解应用于解释为什么权力较小的威权政府如果限制新闻自由可能会面临更大的抗议，为什么委员会多样性在成本投票中是有益的，以及为什么更多样化的社区对公共物品供应的贡献更大。

articles.title: A Long and a Short Leg Make for a Wobbly Equilibrium
articles.authors: Nicolae Gârleanu, Stavros Panageas, Geoffery Zheng
articles.abstract: We provide a model to explain how the interaction between the spot and lending markets for stocks can lead to abrupt changes in short selling activity. Furthermore, rational short sellers may choose to abandon the market even as mispricing widens. We document empirically that the dynamics of short selling are fat tailed and subject to abrupt changes, especially for the stocks that the model identifies as susceptible to such dynamics.
articles.title_cn: 长短不一的腿导致不稳定的平衡
articles.abstract_cn: 我们提供了一个模型来解释股票现货市场和借贷市场之间的互动如何导致做空活动的突然变化。此外，理性的做空者可能会选择放弃市场，即使错误定价扩大。我们从实证上记录了做空动态是胖尾的，并且容易突然变化，特别是对于模型识别为容易受到这种动态影响的股票。

articles.title: Real Credit Cycles
articles.authors: Pedro Bordalo, Nicola Gennaioli, Andrei Shleifer, Stephen J. Terry
articles.abstract: We embed diagnostic expectations in a workhorse neoclassical model with heterogeneous firms and risky debt. A realistic degree of overreaction estimated from US firms' earnings forecasts generates realistic credit cycles. Good times produce economic and financial fragility, predicting future disappointment of expectations, low bond returns, and investment declines. To generate the size of spread increases observed during 2007–2009, the model requires only moderate negative shocks. Diagnostic expectations offer a realistic, parsimonious way to produce financial reversals in business cycle models.
articles.abstract_cn: 我们将诊断性预期嵌入到一个具有异质性企业和风险债务的工作型新古典模型中。从美国公司盈利预测中估计出的现实程度的过度反应产生了现实的信贷周期。好时光产生经济和金融脆弱性，预示着未来预期的失望、低债券回报和投资下降。为了在模型中产生2007-2009年期间观察到的利差增加的规模，模型只需要适度的负面冲击。诊断性预期提供了一种现实且简洁的方法，在商业周期模型中产生金融逆转。

articles.title: Negative Control Falsification Tests for Instrumental Variable Designs
articles.authors: Oren Danieli, Daniel Nevo, Itai Walk, Bar Weinstein, Dan Zeltzer
articles.abstract: The validity of instrumental variable (IV) designs is typically tested using two types of falsification tests. We characterize these tests as conditional independence tests between negative control variables—proxies for unobserved variables posing a threat to the identification—and the IV or the outcome. We describe the conditions variables must satisfy in order to serve as negative controls. We show these falsification tests examine not only independence and the exclusion restriction but also functional form assumptions. Our analysis reveals conventional applications of these tests may flag problems even in valid IV designs. We offer implementation guidance to address these issues.
articles.title_cn: 工具变量设计中的负向控制证伪测试
articles.abstract_cn: 工具变量（IV）设计的有效性通常使用两种类型的伪证测试来检验。我们将这些测试描述为负控制变量（作为对识别构成威胁的未观测变量的代理）与IV或结果之间的条件独立性测试。我们描述了变量必须满足的条件才能作为负控制。我们展示了这些伪证测试不仅检查独立性和排除限制，还检查函数形式假设。我们的分析揭示，这些测试的传统应用甚至可能在有效的IV设计中标记出问题。我们提供了解决这些问题的实施指导。

articles.title: Games on Multiplex Networks
articles.abstract: We develop a simple multilayer network model in which agents allocate effort across layers with heterogeneous structures, subject to an aggregate effort constraint. Incentives are shaped by agents' network positions within each layer, and equilibrium behavior reflects both within- and cross-layer interactions. We analyze how shocks propagate through the network and characterize optimal targeting interventions. Our results show that effective policy design must account for effort allocation across layers. We also demonstrate that predictions from monolayer models can diverge sharply from those of multilayer models, underscoring the importance of accounting for network complexity in both empirical and policy analyses.
articles.title_cn: 多路复用网络上的游戏
articles.abstract_cn: 我们开发了一个简单的多层网络模型，其中代理人在具有不同结构的层之间分配努力，受到总体努力约束的限制。激励机制由代理人在每一层网络中的位置塑造，均衡行为反映了层内和跨层的互动。我们分析了冲击如何通过网络传播，并描述了最优的目标干预措施。我们的结果显示，有效的政策设计必须考虑跨层的努力分配。我们还证明了单层模型的预测可能与多层模型的预测大相径庭，强调了在实证和政策分析中考虑网络复杂性的重要性。

articles.title: Abundance from Abroad: Migrant Income and Long-Run Economic Development
articles.authors: Gaurav Khanna, Emir Murathanoglu, Caroline Theoharides, Dean Yang
articles.abstract: We study how international migrant income prospects affect long-run development in origin areas. We leverage the 1997 Asian Financial Crisis exchange rate shocks in a shift-share identification strategy across Philippine provinces. Initial migrant income shocks are magnified six-fold over time, increasing domestic income, education levels, migrant skills, and high-skilled migration. Remarkably, 74.9 percent of long-run income gains come from domestic rather than migrant income. Trade driven impacts of exchange rate shocks are orthogonal to effects via migrant income. A structural model reveals that 19.7 percent of long-run income gains stem from educational investments. International migration fosters broad economic development in origin communities.
articles.title_cn: 来自海外的丰富：移民收入与长期经济发展
articles.abstract_cn: 我们研究了国际移民的收入前景如何影响原籍地区的长期发展。我们利用1997年亚洲金融危机汇率冲击，在菲律宾各省之间采用份额变化识别策略。最初的移民收入冲击随时间放大了六倍，提高了国内收入、教育水平、移民技能和高技能移民。值得注意的是，长期收入增长中有74.9%来自国内而非移民收入。汇率冲击通过贸易驱动的影响与通过移民收入的影响是正交的。一个结构模型揭示，长期收入增长中有19.7%来自教育投资。国际移民促进了原籍社区的广泛经济发展。

articles.title: Spillovers in State Capacity Building: Evidence from the Digitization of Land Records in Pakistan
articles.abstract: Digitization reforms have been hailed as an effective way of strengthening state capacity. However, digitization can also fundamentally reshape the organization of bureaucracies. Using a unique administrative dataset on agricultural taxation and surveys of local bureaucrats from Punjab, Pakistan, we show that digitization reforms can have unintended consequences for state capacity. We exploit the staggered rollout of the digitization of land records in Punjab to show that digitization had a negative effect on tax collection. The fall in taxes was not due to a decrease in the tax base. Instead, digitization affected the bureaucrats' capacity to collect taxes.
articles.title_cn: 国家能力建设中的溢出效应：来自巴基斯坦土地记录数字化的证据
articles.abstract_cn: 数字化改革被誉为加强国家能力的有效方式。然而，数字化也可以从根本上重塑官僚机构的组织。利用巴基斯坦旁遮普省关于农业税收的独特行政数据集和对当地官僚的调查，我们展示了数字化改革可能对国家能力产生意想不到的后果。我们利用旁遮普省土地记录数字化的分阶段推出，展示了数字化对税收征收的负面影响。税收的下降并不是由于税基的减少。相反，数字化影响了官僚征收税收的能力。

articles.title: Making Bricks from Straw: Resources and Productivity in Health Care
articles.abstract: Why do health facilities in developing countries do so poorly? This paper examines the role of financial constraints. I describe an experiment in which we surprised health workers in randomly selected public health clinics in Nigeria with a ₦600,000 grant paid out in installments over one year. Its administration was left entirely to health workers. The award led to large productivity gains. Using expenditure data combined with novel textual data, I provide an explanation for these effects. I show the award increased investments in physical and human capital, led to lower prices for patients, and inspired health workers to do better.
articles.title_cn: 用稻草制作砖块：医疗保健中的资源与生产力
articles.abstract_cn: 发展中国家的卫生设施为何表现如此不佳？本文考察了财政限制的作用。我描述了一项实验，我们在尼日利亚随机选择的公立医院中，给卫生工作者一个惊喜，即支付了一年分期支付的₦600,000补助金。其管理完全由卫生工作者负责。这项奖励带来了巨大的生产力提升。利用支出数据和新颖的文本数据，我为这些效果提供了一个解释。我展示了这项奖励增加了对物质和人力资本的投资，导致患者价格降低，并激励卫生工作者做得更好。
